metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Brian Lai.

plugins.name: jw-ez-dev
plugins.description: Justworks developer workflow toolkit. Manage JIRA tickets, view sprint boards, and create PRs with JIRA references — all from Claude Code. Requires the Atlassian MCP server. Invoke with /jw-ez-dev:jira-setup, /jw-ez-dev:jira-create, /jw-ez-dev:jira-list, /jw-ez-dev:jira-view, /jw-ez-dev:jira-update, /jw-ez-dev:jira-plan, /jw-ez-dev:jira-board, /jw-ez-dev:pr.
